name: Dependency Graph
notes: Phase B.2 Dependency Graph slice (D1 third target). Own packages/ingestion/src/dependency/** only. Consume frozen 103 public API (SyntaxTree/query as needed) and frozen 104 Symbol model + extract surface — do not re-own or rewrite packages/ingestion/src/parser/** or packages/ingestion/src/extractor/** except documented defect fixes under separate 103/104 auth. B.2 freeze is independent of Memory Engine (201): relationship compute + in-process edge store / pure deltas only; Draft §19 hard-cite of 201 and full-spec applyDelta→graph storage are deferred consumer/phase work. No packages/core edits, no 102 indexer, no 101 live adapters, no dependency IPC, no Gateway/Providers. Layer 4 defines B.2 independent freeze gates; full-spec DoD language about 201/102/101 integration is deferred. Implementation not authorized by governance artifacts alone.
